nasb.text: Come down from your glory And sit on the parched ground, O daughter dwelling in Dibon, For the destroyer of Moab has come up against you, He has ruined your strongholds.

esv.text: “Come down from your glory, and sit on the parched ground, O inhabitant of Dibon! For the destroyer of Moab has come up against you; he has destroyed your strongholds.

cnv.text: 住在底本的人民哪！ 要從你們榮耀的位上下來， 坐在乾旱的地上， 因為毀滅摩押的要上來攻擊你們， 摧毀你們的堅固城。

ccb.text: “底本的居民啊， 你们要从荣耀的位子上下来， 坐在干旱的地上， 因为毁灭摩押的要来攻击你们， 摧毁你们的堡垒。
